/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SDL2_ttf.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libSDL2_ttf-2.0.so.0 -o libSDL2_ttf-2.0.so.0.2200.0 CMakeFiles/SDL2_ttf.dir/SDL_ttf.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/prsro/Projects/GitHub/Dacia Libera+Fractal CCP/umbra_daciei/build/_deps/sdl2-build" ../sdl2-build/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3000.2 /usr/lib/libfreetype.so
